title: Flaky Caramelized Brazilian Hake Skillet
description: A weeknight Brazilian dish featuring hake, caramelized to perfection, with a resinous and cheesy pull, made in a single skillet.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the hake fillets, skin side up, and cook for 3-4 minutes or until the skin is crispy.
Flip the hake fillets and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes or until cooked through.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer for 2-3 minutes or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the shredded cheese until melted and well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
